imageStyleRoom: Richly detailed fantasy concept art in warm brass, amber, and lamplight tones. Slightly painterly with visible texture, worn and lived-in. Dense with specific material detail — interesting surfaces, layered objects, evidence of use and activity. Warm atmospheric lighting from lanterns or glowing materials. Subtle dimensional strangeness: faint glows, unusual textures, geometry that doesn't quite resolve. No people visible. The scene should feel like a place with history and purpose.
imageStyleNpc: Fantasy character portrait, bust or three-quarter view, warm painterly illustration style. Subtle alien features treated as unremarkable — unusual skin textures, odd proportions, extra joints. Practical clothing and visible tools of their trade. Warm brass and lamplight palette. Expressive but understated demeanor. Richly textured with visible brushwork. Soft blurred background suggesting an indoor or sheltered space.
